summary: Iteration 119: Tested Coming Soon creation flow integration. Backend tests: 12 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend tests: Dashboard shows Prossimamente section with 2 Coming Soon items, cards are clickable and show hype/countdown/support/boycott. Film proposals tab shows 4-step flow correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test film (94e7d44a-202e-4a2a-b547-5d54e10a454d) and anime (a30221a2-442d-4349-8c01-aa4a37cafc54)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coming Soon flow is working correctly. Test film 'Test Flow Film' has completed its Coming Soon timer and is ready for casting. The 4-step flow in proposals tab shows: needs_poster -> needs_coming_soon -> coming_soon_active -> casting_ready. Dashboard always shows Prossimamente section with placeholder when empty.

backend: GET /api/coming-soon returns all coming_soon items including pre_casting films
POST /api/film-pipeline/{id}/advance-to-casting blocked when Coming Soon timer not expired
GET /api/coming-soon/{id}/details returns full details with hype/support/boycott counts
frontend: Dashboard always shows Prossimamente section (with placeholder when empty)
Coming Soon cards are clickable and expand to show details
Expanded view shows hype bar, anteprima, audience expectation, support/boycott buttons
Film proposals tab shows 4-step flow: poster -> coming soon -> active -> casting ready
Test film shows 'Coming Soon completato!' and 'Prosegui al Casting' button
